Class StudentPostTests

java.lang.Object
StudentPostTests.StudentPostTests
public class StudentPostTests extends Object
title: StudentPostTests * tests for the Post and Reply classes, makes sure everything from the student user stories works the way it should requirements: REQ01: student can post a question REQ02: post stores its type correctly REQ03: post stores its ID correctly REQ04: all post fields are readable via getters REQ05: student can see posts others have made REQ06: student can see only their own posts REQ07: student can filter by unread posts REQ08: student can search posts by keyword in title REQ09: student can search posts by keyword in topic/body REQ10: posts default to the General thread if none is specified REQ11: student can reply to a thread REQ12: student can reply to a reply REQ13: student can delete their own reply REQ14: deleting a reply with children soft deletes it REQ15: student can update their reply content REQ16: student can update a post title REQ17: student can update a post topic/body REQ18: isValidTitle rejects null REQ19: isValidTitle rejects empty string REQ20: isValidTitle accepts normal text REQ21: isValidTopic rejects null REQ22: isValidTopic rejects empty string REQ23: isValidAuthor rejects null REQ24: isValidAuthor rejects empty string REQ25: isValidType accepts Discussion REQ26: isValidType accepts Question
Version:
1.00 2025-11-01
Author:
CSE 360 Group 11

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StudentPostTests()
    Constructor for StudentPostTests.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    check(String name, boolean condition)
    prints pass or fail for a test true = pass, false = fail
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    runs all tests and prints a count at the end
    static void
    testCreateQuestion()
    tests REQ01 students can post a question - makes a Question type post
    static void
    testDefaultGeneralThread()
    tests REQ10 if no thread is specified a post defaults to the General thread the title "General" is what the DB uses for the default thread
    static void
    testDeleteReply()
    tests REQ13 students can delete their own reply - simulates removing from list
    static void
    testFilterMyPosts()
    tests REQ06 students can filter to see only their own posts
    static void
    testFilterUnread()
    tests REQ07 students can filter to see only unread posts simulates this by tracking which posts a user has read
    static void
    testIsValidAuthorEmpty()
    tests REQ24 - empty string should be invalid
    static void
    testIsValidAuthorNull()
    tests REQ23 - null should be invalid
    static void
    testIsValidTitleEmpty()
    tests REQ19 - empty string should be invalid
    static void
    testIsValidTitleNull()
    tests REQ18 - null should be invalid
    static void
    testIsValidTitleValid()
    tests REQ20 - normal text should be valid
    static void
    testIsValidTopicEmpty()
    tests REQ22 - empty string should be invalid
    static void
    testIsValidTopicNull()
    tests REQ21 - null should be invalid
    static void
    testIsValidTypeDiscussion()
    tests REQ25 - Discussion should be valid
    static void
    testIsValidTypeQuestion()
    tests REQ26 - Question should be valid
    static void
    testKeywordInTitle()
    tests REQ08 students can search posts by keyword in the title
    static void
    testKeywordInTopic()
    tests REQ09 students can search posts by keyword in the body/topic
    static void
    testNestedReply()
    tests REQ12 students can reply to another reply - parentId points to the parent reply
    static void
    testPostGetters()
    tests REQ04 all five getters return the right values
    static void
    testPostStoresId()
    tests REQ03 post stores its ID correctly
    static void
    testPostStoresType()
    tests REQ02 post stores its type correctly
    static void
    testReadAllPosts()
    tests REQ05 students can see a list of all posts - simulates loading all posts
    static void
    testReplyToThread()
    tests REQ11 students can reply to a thread - parentId 0 means direct reply to thread
    static void
    testSoftDeleteWithChildren()
    tests REQ14 if a deleted reply has children it shows sentinel text instead of being removed this is what the DB does when softDeleteReply() is called
    static void
    testUpdatePostTitle()
    tests REQ16 students can edit the title of their own post
    static void
    testUpdatePostTopic()
    tests REQ17 students can edit the body/topic of their own post
    static void
    testUpdateReplyContent()
    tests REQ15 students can update the content of their own reply

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      runs all tests and prints a count at the end
      Parameters:
      args - not used

    • check

      public static void check(String name, boolean condition)
      prints pass or fail for a test true = pass, false = fail
      Parameters:
      name - what test this is
      condition - the result

    • testCreateQuestion

      public static void testCreateQuestion()
      tests REQ01 students can post a question - makes a Question type post

    • testPostStoresType

      public static void testPostStoresType()
      tests REQ02 post stores its type correctly

    • testPostStoresId

      public static void testPostStoresId()
      tests REQ03 post stores its ID correctly

    • testPostGetters

      public static void testPostGetters()
      tests REQ04 all five getters return the right values

    • testReadAllPosts

      public static void testReadAllPosts()
      tests REQ05 students can see a list of all posts - simulates loading all posts

    • testFilterMyPosts

      public static void testFilterMyPosts()
      tests REQ06 students can filter to see only their own posts

    • testFilterUnread

      public static void testFilterUnread()
      tests REQ07 students can filter to see only unread posts simulates this by tracking which posts a user has read

    • testKeywordInTitle

      public static void testKeywordInTitle()
      tests REQ08 students can search posts by keyword in the title

    • testKeywordInTopic

      public static void testKeywordInTopic()
      tests REQ09 students can search posts by keyword in the body/topic

    • testDefaultGeneralThread

      public static void testDefaultGeneralThread()
      tests REQ10 if no thread is specified a post defaults to the General thread the title "General" is what the DB uses for the default thread

    • testReplyToThread

      public static void testReplyToThread()
      tests REQ11 students can reply to a thread - parentId 0 means direct reply to thread

    • testNestedReply

      public static void testNestedReply()
      tests REQ12 students can reply to another reply - parentId points to the parent reply

    • testDeleteReply

      public static void testDeleteReply()
      tests REQ13 students can delete their own reply - simulates removing from list

    • testSoftDeleteWithChildren

      public static void testSoftDeleteWithChildren()
      tests REQ14 if a deleted reply has children it shows sentinel text instead of being removed this is what the DB does when softDeleteReply() is called

    • testUpdateReplyContent

      public static void testUpdateReplyContent()
      tests REQ15 students can update the content of their own reply

    • testUpdatePostTitle

      public static void testUpdatePostTitle()
      tests REQ16 students can edit the title of their own post

    • testUpdatePostTopic

      public static void testUpdatePostTopic()
      tests REQ17 students can edit the body/topic of their own post

      tests REQ18 - null should be invalid
